title: 🇲🇾 Malaysian Economic Pulse
text:
Note



Score reflects cost-of-living pressure on a 0–100 scale. Higher = more pressure on Malaysian households. Components: food prices (30%), fuel cost (25%), CPI (25%), public transport uptake (10%), EV adoption (10%).
